name: Danny Buck Davidson

contactInfo.office: 110 S. Sycamore St., Suite 200, Carthage, TX 75633

bio: Danny Buck Davidson serves as the District Attorney for Panola County, overseeing felony prosecutions in the Carthage area. He is dedicated to upholding justice and ensuring public safety for all Panola County residents.
campaignPromises: Aggressively prosecute violent crime in Panola County
Combat drug trafficking along the Louisiana border
Advocate for the rights of crime victims
Maintain transparency and accountability in the DA's office
Strengthen relationships with local law enforcement
